summary: Align the remaining Gemini Flash references in the runtime policy and model catalog to the preview identifier used by dashboard provider probes and bootstrap coverage.
root_cause: The repo mixed `google/gemini-3-flash` and `google/gemini-3-flash-preview` across catalog, routing policy, and provider-facing checks.
fix_approach: Standardized the remaining changed surfaces on the preview identifier already used by runtime authority and provider health checks, and kept dashboard provider tests passing with explicit write-token setup.

validation.notes: Model policy and catalog now match the preview ID used by provider checks in the changed runtime path.
